subcodes.first_line: O ye two blessed souls! Your letters arrived and a brief answer is being written. In reality ye are contributing a great deal through your distinguished service
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو نفس مبارک نامه های شما رسید مختصر جواب مرقوم میگردد فی الحقیقه خدمت
subcodes.subjects: @review of publications, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @unity; oneness of humanity, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration
